<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Retrieve a project-level Kargo Role virtual resource"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1beta1/projects/{project}/roles/{role}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve a project-level Kargo Role virtual resource by name.
Returns a Kargo Role virtual resource or its underlying
Kubernetes resources.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
